abstract.t:
Packet Replication, Elimination, and Ordering Functions (PREOF) enables highly reliable packet delivery through path redundancy and packet sequencing mechanisms in DetNet domains.
Existing DetNet Operations, Administration, and Maintenance (OAM) specifications provide mechanisms for monitoring service connectivity, packet loss, delay, and overall service performance. However, they do not provide detailed operational visibility into the behavior of PREOF functions themselves.
This document identifies operational observability gaps associated with PREOF, defines requirements for PREOF-specific OAM, and introduces a set of observable events and metrics to monitor, troubleshoot, and validate PREOF operation independently of the underlying DetNet data plane technology.
